prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约70名、87名、193名、104名、105名。2023年出现明显波动（193名），2024年迅速回升至104名，202 5年稳定在105名，近两年趋于平稳，2025年基准位次约105名；2021–2025年浙江大学在海南省综合类招生计划均为6人，2026年计划增至7人，较2025 年扩招约16.7%，扩招通常使录取位次数字增大（更易进），但需结合其他因素综合判断。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名 连续多年稳居第3名（2021–2026年），属于国内顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内浙大声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端、师德师 风及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第14位（高热），短视频曝光量大，总体关注度仍处高位；浙大拥有A+学科14个 （计算机科学与技术、软件工程、控制科学与工程、光学工程、机械工程、数学、土木工程、化学工程与技术、动力工程及工程热物理、植物保护、生态学、管理科学与工程、药 学、外国语言文学），A类学科众多，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等浙大优势专业社会热度持续高热（ 2024年热指数分别为67.8、76.86、74.28），报考竞争激烈；海南省2026年考生总数约78000人（较2025年67408人增长约15.7%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争，无明显变化；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州市，与海南省距离较远，但作为全国顶尖高校，跨省吸引力不受地域限制；该校在海南省招生占比 极小（约0.01%），属全国性招生布局。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次105名、2026年扩招至7人、海南省考生总数增长约15.7%加剧竞争、浙大优势专业 热度持续高企等因素，预计2026年录取位次较2025年小幅前移（位次数字减小）。预测最低录取位次约111名，波动区间61–161名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院混合班）
- 工科试验班（计算机）（包含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全）
- 工科试验班（竺可桢学院图灵班）（包含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、人工智能）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（先进新材料卓越班）（包含材料科学与工程、高分子材料与工程）
- 人工智能（荣誉项目班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 社会科学试验班（竺可桢学院人文社科实验班）（包含经济学、财政学、金融学等）
- 社会科学试验班（数字法治卓越班）（包含法学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约111名，区间61–161名。位次在区间下限（61名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（竺可桢学院混合班/图灵班/计算机）；位次在预测值附近（111名左右）建议以二档 为主、一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（161名附近）可考虑三档专业保底。浙大在海南招生计划仅7人，竞争极为激烈，建议高分考生优先填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 70, 87, 193, 104, and 105 respectively. There was a significant fluctuation in 2023 (193), a rapid recovery to 104 in 2024, and stability at 105 in 2025, with the recent two years trending towards stability. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 105. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for Zhejiang University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category was 6 students each year. In 2026, the plan increases to 7 students, an expansion of about 16.7% compared to 2025. Expansion usually increases the admission ranking number (easier to enter), but other factors need to be considered comprehensively.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. It has consistently ranked 3rd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for many years (2021–2026), placing it among the top-tier universities in China, with strong appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and campus safety incidents, which may mildly suppress some students' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with high short video exposure, and overall attention remains high. Zhejiang University has 14 A+ disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Mathematics, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Plant Protection, Ecology, Management Science and Engineering, Pharmacy, Foreign Languages and Literatures), with numerous A-level disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors and strongly attracting students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Zhejiang University's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (2024 heat indices were 67.8, 76.86, and 74.28 respectively), leading to intense competition for applications. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Hainan Province is approximately 78,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025), and the expansion of the examinee pool intensifies competition, with no significant changes. Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, which is far from Hainan Province, but as a top national university, its cross-provincial appeal is not limited by region. Its enrollment proportion in Hainan Province is extremely small (about 0.01%), belonging to a nationwide enrollment layout.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 105 in 2025, the expansion to 7 students in 2026, the increase in the total number of examinees in Hainan Province by about 15.7% intensifying competition, and the persistently high popularity of Zhejiang University's advantageous majors, it is expected that the admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases). The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 111, with a fluctuation range of 61–161.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Turing Class) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced New Materials Excellence Class) (includes Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Artificial Intelligence (Honors Program Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class) (includes Economics, Finance, Finance, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Digital Rule of Law Excellence Class) (includes Law)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 111, with a range of 61–161. Candidates with rankings at the lower limit of the range (within 61) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Chu Kochen Honors College Mixed Class/Turing Class/Computer). Candidates with rankings near the predicted value (around 111) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 161) can consider Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Zhejiang University's enrollment plan in Hainan is only 7 students, making competition extremely intense. High-scoring candidates are advised to prioritize filling in their applications.
